title: VaultMaturedEvent
description: Published when a vesting/locking vault reaches maturity and is released. Consumed by the GraphQL `vaultMatured` subscription (backend/src/graphql/resolvers.ts, SUBSCRIPTION_TOPICS.vaultMatured).

schemaVersion.description: Schema version for this event type. Bump on breaking changes.

creatorAddress.description: Owning token's creator address, used for tenant scoping (TenantScopedPayload).

amount.description: Amount released — stringified bigint (string) or raw bigint depending on the publisher; type intentionally unconstrained since JSON Schema has no bigint primitive.
